queries.question: Show the death count and province names in areas with more than 1.5M people.
queries.sql: SELECT Number_Of_Deaths.total_deaths, Province.name FROM Number_Of_Deaths JOIN Province ON Number_Of_Deaths.year = Province.year WHERE Province.population > 1500000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?total_deaths ?name WHERE {
  ?number_of_deaths a :Number_Of_Deaths .
  ?province a :Province .
  ?province p:hasNumber_Of_Deaths ?number_of_deaths .
  ?number_of_deaths p:total_deaths ?total_deaths .
  ?province p:name ?name .
  ?province p:population ?population_f .
  FILTER(?population_f > 1500000)
}

queries.question: Show me the mortality trends and population for new york
queries.sql: SELECT Number_Of_Deaths.total_deaths, Province.population FROM Province JOIN Number_Of_Deaths ON Province.year = Number_Of_Deaths.year WHERE Province.name = 'New York'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?total_deaths ?population WHERE {
  ?province a :Province .
  ?number_of_deaths a :Number_Of_Deaths .
  ?province p:hasNumber_Of_Deaths ?number_of_deaths .
  ?number_of_deaths p:total_deaths ?total_deaths .
  ?province p:population ?population .
  ?province p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(?name_f = "New York")
}

queries.question: Show me the mortality trends and population for new york
queries.sql: SELECT Crude_Death_Rate.rate, Province.population FROM Province JOIN Crude_Death_Rate ON Province.year = Crude_Death_Rate.year WHERE Province.name = 'New York'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
SELECT ?rate ?pop WHERE {
  ?pr a :Province ; p:year ?y ; p:name ?nm ; p:population ?pop .
  ?cdr a :Crude_Death_Rate ; p:year ?y2 ; p:rate ?rate .
  FILTER(STR(?y)=STR(?y2)) FILTER(?nm='New York')
}

queries.question: Show me the mortality trends and population for new york
queries.sql: SELECT Number_Of_Deaths.total_deaths, Crude_Death_Rate.rate, Province.population FROM Province JOIN Number_Of_Deaths ON Province.year = Number_Of_Deaths.year JOIN Crude_Death_Rate ON Province.year = Crude_Death_Rate.year WHERE Province.name = 'New York'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
SELECT ?td ?rate ?pop WHERE {
  ?pr a :Province ; p:year ?y ; p:name ?nm ; p:population ?pop .
  ?nod a :Number_Of_Deaths ; p:year ?y2 ; p:total_deaths ?td .
  ?cdr a :Crude_Death_Rate ; p:year ?y3 ; p:rate ?rate .
  FILTER(STR(?y)=STR(?y2)) FILTER(STR(?y)=STR(?y3)) FILTER(?nm='New York')
}

queries.question: List all the death rates for places with a population greater than 1.5M and names of these places.
queries.sql: SELECT Crude_Death_Rate.rate, Province.name FROM Crude_Death_Rate JOIN Province ON Crude_Death_Rate.year = Province.year WHERE Province.population > 1500000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?rate ?nm WHERE {
  ?cdr a :Crude_Death_Rate ; p:year ?y2 ; p:rate ?rate .
  ?pr a :Province ; p:year ?y ; p:name ?nm ; p:population ?pop .
  FILTER(STR(?y)=STR(?y2)) FILTER(?pop > 1500000)
}

queries.question: show me the mortality trends and names of provinces with a population greater than 1,500,000
queries.sql: SELECT Number_Of_Deaths.total_deaths, Crude_Death_Rate.rate, Province.name FROM Number_Of_Deaths JOIN Province ON Number_Of_Deaths.year = Province.year JOIN Crude_Death_Rate ON Province.year = Crude_Death_Rate.year WHERE Province.population > 1500000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
SELECT ?td ?rate ?nm WHERE {
  ?nod a :Number_Of_Deaths ; p:year ?y2 ; p:total_deaths ?td .
  ?pr a :Province ; p:year ?y ; p:name ?nm ; p:population ?pop .
  ?cdr a :Crude_Death_Rate ; p:year ?y3 ; p:rate ?rate .
  FILTER(STR(?y)=STR(?y2)) FILTER(STR(?y)=STR(?y3)) FILTER(?pop > 1500000)
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: show me the mortality trends and names of provinces with a population greater than 1,500,000
Show me the mortality trends and population for new york
